---
title: "About Me"
---

About this site

## Cat Photo Gallery

::: gallery-grid
<a href="images/photo1.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1"> <img src="images/photo1.jpg" alt="Photo 1"/> </a>

<a href="images/photo2.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1"> ![Photo 2](images/photo2.jpeg){alt="Photo 2"} </a>

<a href="images/photo3.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1"> ![Photo 3](images/photo3.jpeg){alt="Photo 3"} </a>

<a href="images/photo4.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1"> ![Photo 4](images/photo4.jpeg){alt="Photo 4"} </a>

<a href="images/photo5.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1"> ![Photo 5](images/photo5.jpeg){alt="Photo 5"} </a>

<a href="images/photo6.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1"> ![Photo 6](images/photo10.JPG){alt="Photo 6"} </a>
:::

```{=html}
<script>
  const lightbox = GLightbox({
    touchNavigation: true,
    loop: true,
    zoomable: true
  });
</script>
```
